text: The word engineer (Latin ingeniator, the origin of the Ir
notes: Source: en.wikipedia.org. Article: Engineer. Topic: occupations.

text: in the title of engineer in countries like Belgium, The Netherlands, and Indonesia) is derived from the Latin words ingeniare ("to contrive, devise") and ingenium ("cleverness")
notes: Source: en.wikipedia.org. Article: Engineer. Topic: occupations.

text: The work of engineers forms the link between scientific discoveries and their subsequent applications to human and business needs and quality of life
notes: Source: en.wikipedia.org. Article: Engineer. Topic: occupations.

text: His/her work is predominantly intellectual and varied and not of a routine mental or physical character
notes: Source: en.wikipedia.org. Article: Engineer. Topic: occupations.

text: It requires the exercise of original thought and judgment and the ability to supervise the technical and administrative work of others
notes: Source: en.wikipedia.org. Article: Engineer. Topic: occupations.

text: Engineering is the practice of using natural science, mathematics, and the engineering design process to solve problems within technology, increase efficiency and productivity, and improve systems
notes: Source: en.wikipedia.org. Article: Engineering. Topic: occupations.

text: The traditional disciplines of engineering are civil, mechanical, electrical, and chemical
notes: Source: en.wikipedia.org. Article: Engineering. Topic: occupations.

text: The academic discipline of engineering encompasses a broad range of more specialized subfields, and each can have a more specific emphasis for applications of mathematics and science
notes: Source: en.wikipedia.org. Article: Engineering. Topic: occupations.

text: As a human endeavor, engineering has existed since ancient times, starting with the six classic simple machines
notes: Source: en.wikipedia.org. Article: Engineering. Topic: occupations.

text: Early machines were powered by humans and animals, then later by wind
notes: Source: en.wikipedia.org. Article: Engineering. Topic: occupations.
